notices.fsrs_fields_exists: File already has FSRS fields. Use review command to update.
notices.wasm_not_ready: FSRS component not ready. Please restart Obsidian.
notices.settings_changed_reload: FSRS settings changed. Reload plugin to apply.
notices.card_not_due: Card already reviewed. Next scheduled review: {date}
notices.early_review_blocked: Only one review per day is counted. Next review available in {minutes} {noun}. Scheduled: {date}
notices.review_button_exists: Review button block already exists in this file

descriptions.stability: Stability (S) — FSRS parameter determining growth interval
descriptions.retrievability: Retrievability (R) — probability of correct answer at this moment
descriptions.due: Date and time of next review
descriptions.state: Card state: New, Learning, Review, Relearning

parameters.heading: Parameters (SQL syntax)
parameters.select: **`SELECT field1, field2 as "Title", ...`** — select fields to display
parameters.order_by: **`ORDER BY field ASC|DESC`** — sort by specified field (ASC - ascending, DESC - descending)
parameters.limit: **`LIMIT number`** — limit number of rows (0 = use plugin default, usually 30)
parameters.notes: **Note:** If ORDER BY is not specified, default sorting ORDER BY retrievability ASC is used. Custom ORDER BY overrides default.

general.heading: General information
general.description: The `fsrs-table` block displays a table of FSRS cards with customizable columns and sorting.

notes.heading: Notes
notes.cache: Table data is cached and refreshed when opening the file.
notes.click_file: Click on file name opens the corresponding note.
notes.click_row: Click on table row also opens the file.
notes.default_sort: Without ORDER BY parameter, default sorting ORDER BY retrievability ASC is used.
notes.custom_sort: With ORDER BY parameter, user-specified sorting is used.
notes.rounding: All numeric values are rounded for better readability.

request_retention.name: Request retention
request_retention.desc: Target retention rate (0.0-1.0). Higher = more reviews, lower retention.

enable_fuzz.name: Enable interval fuzz
enable_fuzz.desc: Add random variation to intervals (±5%) to prevent card grouping.

initial_stability.name: Initial stability
initial_stability.desc: Default stability value for new cards.

initial_difficulty.name: Initial difficulty
initial_difficulty.desc: Default difficulty value for new cards.

auto_add_button.name: Auto add review button block under frontmatter
auto_add_button.desc: Automatically insert review button block after frontmatter when adding FSRS fields. Example: ```fsrs-review-button```

verbose_logging.name: Verbose logging
verbose_logging.desc: Show detailed performance logs with emojis (⏱️, ✅) in Obsidian console. Useful for debugging.

heatmap_target.name: Daily review target for heatmap
heatmap_target.desc: Number of reviews per day at which the cell color is most saturated. Above this, color brightens.

heatmap_color.name: Heatmap color
heatmap_color.desc: Leave empty to use Obsidian accent color.

custom_button_labels.name: Custom button labels
custom_button_labels.desc: Override review button text. Leave empty to use default translation.

ignore_patterns.name: Ignore patterns
ignore_patterns.desc: File and folder patterns to ignore (one per line). Patterns ending with / are folders. *.extension for file types. Example: config/, templates/, *.excalidraw.md
